# Files / directory globs exempt from the 150-350 LOC target declared in
# CLAUDE.md `Universal Principles`. Syntax: gitignore-style — one pattern
# per line, comments start with `#`, leading `!` negates a prior match,
# trailing `/` means directory.
#
# Add entries when a file genuinely earns the exemption (large data
# manifests, generated files, vendored code, intentionally-comprehensive
# reference docs). Default state is empty: every file targets 150-350.
